build.buildCommand: sh -lc 'case "${SERVICE_TARGET:-api}" in api) pnpm -r --filter @cio/api... build ;; dashboard) NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=3072" pnpm -r --filter @cio/dashboard... build ;; *) echo "Unsupported SERVICE_TARGET: ${SERVICE_TARGET:-api}" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'

deploy.preDeployCommand: sh -lc 'if [ "${SERVICE_TARGET:-api}" = "api" ]; then pnpm --filter @cio/db db:setup; else echo "Skipping db setup for ${SERVICE_TARGET:-api}"; fi'
deploy.startCommand: sh -lc 'case "${SERVICE_TARGET:-api}" in api) exec pnpm --filter @cio/api start ;; dashboard) exec pnpm --filter @cio/dashboard start ;; *) echo "Unsupported SERVICE_TARGET: ${SERVICE_TARGET:-api}" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
